variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Filled/Background/Active
variables.description: Primary-level action background, meant to exclusively be paired with primary-filled-content colors.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Filled/Background/Hover
variables.description: Primary-level action background, meant to exclusively be paired with primary-filled-content colors.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Filled/Background/Default
variables.description: Primary-level action background, meant to exclusively be paired with primary-filled-content colors.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Filled/Background/Disabled
variables.description: Primary-level action background, meant to exclusively be paired with primary-filled-content colors.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Hollow/Background/Active
variables.description: A primary-level interactive background color ONLY to be used for elements utilizing primary-hollow-content variables.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Hollow/Background/Hover
variables.description: A primary-level interactive background color ONLY to be used for elements utilizing primary-hollow-content variables.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Filled/Background/Active
variables.description: Secondary-level action background, meant to exclusively be paired with secondary-filled-content colors.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Filled/Background/Hover
variables.description: Secondary-level action background, meant to exclusively be paired with secondary-filled-content colors.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Filled/Background/Default
variables.description: Secondary-level action background, meant to exclusively be paired with secondary-filled-content colors.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Filled/Content/Active
variables.description: Used for text content or SVG elements ONLY on top of interactive filled backgrounds. An example being secondary buttons or toggle controls. For all elements using interactive filled content types, the correlating interactive filled background token must be used.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Filled/Background/Disabled
variables.description: Secondary-level action background, meant to exclusively be paired with secondary-filled-content colors.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Filled/Content/Hover
variables.description: Used for text content or SVG elements ONLY on top of interactive filled backgrounds. An example being secondary buttons or toggle controls. For all elements using interactive filled content types, the correlating interactive filled background token must be used.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Filled/Content/Default
variables.description: Used for text content or SVG elements ONLY on top of interactive filled backgrounds. An example being secondary buttons or toggle controls. For all elements using interactive filled content types, the correlating interactive filled background token must be used.

variables.name: Neutral/Content/Primary
variables.description: Used for non-interactive text or other content (Text that does not change state)

variables.name: Neutral/Content/Secondary
variables.description: Used for non-interactive text or other content (Text that does not change state)

variables.name: Neutral/Content/Tertiary
variables.description: Used for non-interactive text or other content (Text that does not change state)

variables.name: Neutral/Content/Subtle
variables.description: Used for non-interactive text or other content (Text that does not change state)

variables.name: Neutral/Background/Subtle
variables.description: An even larger distinguishing background color offset from the default app's background color.

variables.name: Neutral/Background/Offset
variables.description: An offset color for the app, for example, used to distinguish between sections of content blocks.

variables.name: Neutral/Background/Default
variables.description: The default background color for the app.

variables.name: Status/Informative/Content/Defaut
variables.description: Used for text or icon content that represents an informational state.

variables.name: Status/Informative/Stroke/Default
variables.description: An informative-state border color used for elements that employ status/informative/content tokens. Suitable for outlining UI elements conveying non-critical information (e.g., info tooltips or note frames).

variables.name: Status/Informative/Background/Default
variables.description: An informative-state background color used for elements that employ status/informative/content tokens. Best suited for non-critical information like tooltips, guidance panels, or read-only hints.

variables.name: Status/Success/Content/Default
variables.description: Used for text or icon content that represents a success state. Suitable for confirmation messages, completed actions, or positive feedback

variables.name: Status/Success/Stroke/Default
variables.description: A success-state border color used for elements that employ status/success/content tokens. Applies to outlines or frames indicating positive feedback (e.g., success badges or focused success inputs).

variables.name: Status/Success/Background/Default
variables.description: A success-state background color used for elements that employ status/success/content tokens. Should be applied to containers or surfaces (e.g., badges, notifications, cards) that need a positive-state emphasis.

variables.name: Status/Warning/Content/Default
variables.description: Used for text or icon content that represents a warning state. Suitable for cautionary prompts, validation alerts, or soft notices.

variables.name: Status/Warning/Stroke/Default
variables.description: A warning-state border color used for elements that employ status/warning/content tokens. Ideal for outlining components that need a cautionary visual (e.g., warning inputs or alert borders).

variables.name: Status/Warning/Background/Default
variables.description: A warning-state background color used for elements that employ status/warning/content tokens. Ideal for cautionary UI components like alerts, helper banners, or validation indicators.

variables.name: Status/Error/Content/Default
variables.description: A general-use error state for text or icon content.

variables.name: Status/Error/Stroke/Default
variables.description: A conditionally error state border color used for elements using status-error-content variables.

variables.name: Status/Error/Background/Default
variables.description: A conditionally error state background used for elements using status-error-content variables.

variables.name: Effects/OverlaySolid
variables.description: Used as the background behind popover display components such as modals.

variables.name: Effects/ShadowDefault
variables.description: Color used for elevation drop shadow effects only.

variables.name: Effects/ShadowCallout
variables.description: Color used for elevation drop shadow effects only.

variables.name: OnMedia/Interactive/Filled/Content/Active
variables.description: Used for text or icon content on filled interactive elements placed over media surfaces. Designed to maintain legibility and contrast over complex backgrounds. Must be paired with onmedia-interactive-filled-background tokens.

variables.name: OnMedia/Interactive/Filled/Content/Hover
variables.description: Used for text or icon content on filled interactive elements placed over media surfaces. Designed to maintain legibility and contrast over complex backgrounds. Must be paired with onmedia-interactive-filled-background tokens.

variables.name: OnMedia/Interactive/Filled/Content/Default
variables.description: Used for text or icon content on filled interactive elements placed over media surfaces. Designed to maintain legibility and contrast over complex backgrounds. Must be paired with onmedia-interactive-filled-background tokens.

variables.name: OnMedia/Interactive/Filled/Content/Disabled
variables.description: Used for text or icon content on filled interactive elements placed over media surfaces. Designed to maintain legibility and contrast over complex backgrounds. Must be paired with onmedia-interactive-filled-background tokens.

variables.name: OnMedia/Neutral/Content/Primary
variables.description: Used for non-interactive text or icon content placed on top of media surfaces such as images, video, or accent backgrounds. Intended for elements that do not change state or respond to interaction.

variables.name: OnMedia/Neutral/Content/Secondary
variables.description: Used for non-interactive text or icon content placed on top of media surfaces such as images, video, or accent backgrounds. Intended for elements that do not change state or respond to interaction.

variables.name: OnMedia/Neutral/Content/Tertiary
variables.description: Used for non-interactive text or icon content placed on top of media surfaces such as images, video, or accent backgrounds. Intended for elements that do not change state or respond to interaction.

variables.name: OnMedia/Neutral/Content/Subtle
variables.description: Used for non-interactive text or icon content placed on top of media surfaces such as images, video, or accent backgrounds. Intended for elements that do not change state or respond to interaction.

variables.name: Accents/Gradient/PrimaryStart
variables.description: Color variable only to be used a color stop for gradient styles.

variables.name: Accents/Gradient/PrimaryEnd
variables.description: Color variable only to be used a color stop for gradient styles.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Hollow/Content/Active
variables.description: A primary-level interactive content used for higher-priority links or hollow primary-level actions. Hollow interactive content types do not require a background or border element.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Hollow/Content/Hover
variables.description: A primary-level interactive content used for higher-priority links or hollow primary-level actions. Hollow interactive content types do not require a background or border element.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Hollow/Content/Default
variables.description: A primary-level interactive content used for higher-priority links or hollow primary-level actions. Hollow interactive content types do not require a background or border element.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Hollow/Content/Disabled
variables.description: A primary-level interactive content used for higher-priority links or hollow primary-level actions. Hollow interactive content types do not require a background or border element.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Filled/Content/Default
variables.description: Used for text content or SVG elements ONLY on top of interactive filled backgrounds. An example being primary buttons. For all elements using interactive filled content types, the correlating interactive filled background token must be used.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Filled/Content/Disabled
variables.description: Used for text content or SVG elements ONLY on top of interactive filled backgrounds. An example being primary buttons. For all elements using interactive filled content types, the correlating interactive filled background token must be used.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Filled/Content/Hover
variables.description: Used for text content or SVG elements ONLY on top of interactive filled backgrounds. An example being primary buttons. For all elements using interactive filled content types, the correlating interactive filled background token must be used.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Filled/Content/Active
variables.description: Used for text content or SVG elements ONLY on top of interactive filled backgrounds. An example being primary buttons. For all elements using interactive filled content types, the correlating interactive filled background token must be used.

variables.name: Neutral/Stroke/Default
variables.description: Default non-interactive stroke color, primarily used on elements such as dividers or non-interactive card elements.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Content/Default
variables.description: Used for text, icons, and indicators within input-based elements where users provide or edit information. Applies to components like text fields, checkboxes, radios, and date pickers. Not intended for use on buttons or non-input interactive elements.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Background/Active
variables.description: A secondary-level interactive background color ONLY to be used for elements utilizing secondary-hollow-content variables.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Background/Hover
variables.description: A secondary-level interactive background color ONLY to be used for elements utilizing secondary-hollow-content variables.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Background/Default
variables.description: A secondary-level interactive background color ONLY to be used for elements utilizing secondary-hollow-content variables.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Content/Disabled
variables.description: A secondary-level interactive content used for medium-priority links or hollow secondary-level actions ranging from buttons to checkboxes to tabs. Hollow interactive content types do not require a background or border element.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Content/Hover
variables.description: A secondary-level interactive content used for medium-priority links or hollow secondary-level actions. Hollow interactive content types do not require a background or border element.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Content/Default
variables.description: A secondary-level interactive content used for medium-priority links or hollow secondary-level actions ranging from buttons to checkboxes to tabs. Hollow interactive content types do not require a background or border element.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Content/Active
variables.description: A secondary-level interactive content used for medium-priority links or hollow secondary-level actions ranging from buttons to checkboxes to tabs. Hollow interactive content types do not require a background or border element.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Hollow/Stroke/Default
variables.description: Used as an optional border for interactive elements that utilize primary-hollow-content tokens. Typically applied to buttons or controls that may need a visible outline, such as the border on a primary-level hollow button.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Content/Placeholder
variables.description: Used for text, icons, and indicators within input-based elements where users provide or edit information. Applies to components like text fields, checkboxes, radios, and date pickers. Not intended for use on buttons or non-input interactive elements.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Content/Suggested
variables.description: Used for text, icons, and indicators within input-based elements where users provide or edit information. Applies to components like text fields, checkboxes, radios, and date pickers. Not intended for use on buttons or non-input interactive elements.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Background/Default
variables.description: Background color for input elements such as text fields, selects, multiselects, and date pickers. Designed for components where users input or customize data. Should not be used for action-based components like buttons or sliders. Only to be used for elements utilizing interactive-inputs-content tokens.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Background/Hover
variables.description: Background color for input elements such as text fields, selects, multiselects, and date pickers. Designed for components where users input or customize data. Should not be used for action-based components like buttons or sliders. Only to be used for elements utilizing interactive-inputs-content tokens.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Background/Active
variables.description: Background color for input elements such as text fields, selects, multiselects, and date pickers. Designed for components where users input or customize data. Should not be used for action-based components like buttons or sliders. Only to be used for elements utilizing interactive-inputs-content tokens.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Background/Disabled
variables.description: Background color for input elements such as text fields, selects, multiselects, and date pickers. Designed for components where users input or customize data. Should not be used for action-based components like buttons or sliders. Only to be used for elements utilizing interactive-inputs-content tokens.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Stroke/Default
variables.description: Used as a border or outline for input elements to indicate states like default, focus, or error. Intended for components such as form fields, checkboxes, radios, and toggles where users interact with their own data. Not for general UI element outlines.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Stroke/Hover
variables.description: Used as a border or outline for input elements to indicate states like default, focus, or error. Intended for components such as form fields, checkboxes, radios, and toggles where users interact with their own data. Not for general UI element outlines.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Stroke/Active
variables.description: Used as a border or outline for input elements to indicate states like default, focus, or error. Intended for components such as form fields, checkboxes, radios, and toggles where users interact with their own data. Not for general UI element outlines.

variables.name: Interactive/Fields/Stroke/Disabled
variables.description: Used as a border or outline for input elements to indicate states like default, focus, or error. Intended for components such as form fields, checkboxes, radios, and toggles where users interact with their own data. Not for general UI element outlines.

variables.description: A primary-level interactive background color ONLY to be used for elements utilizing primary-hollow-content variables.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Hollow/Background/Disabled
variables.description: A primary-level interactive background color ONLY to be used for elements utilizing primary-hollow-content variables.

variables.name: Interactive/Primary/Hollow/Stroke/Hover

variables.description: Used as an optional border for interactive elements that utilize primary-hollow-content tokens. Typically applied to buttons or controls that may need a visible outline, such as the border on a primary-level hollow button.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Stroke/Default
variables.description: Used as an optional border for interactive elements that utilize secondary-hollow-content tokens. Typically applied to buttons or controls that may need a visible outline, such as the border on a secondary-level hollow button.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Stroke/Hover
variables.description: Used as an optional border for interactive elements that utilize secondary-hollow-content tokens. Typically applied to buttons or controls that may need a visible outline, such as the border on a secondary-level hollow button.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Stroke/Active
variables.description: Used as an optional border for interactive elements that utilize secondary-hollow-content tokens. Typically applied to buttons or controls that may need a visible outline, such as the border on a secondary-level hollow button.

variables.description: Used as an optional border for interactive elements that utilize secondary-hollow-content tokens. Typically applied to buttons or controls that may need a visible outline, such as the border on a secondary-level hollow button.

variables.name: Effects/Focus
variables.description: Used for focus indicators on secondary-level interactive elements, such as secondary buttons, segmented controls, or hollow actions. Maintains accessibility clarity while aligning with the secondary visual language. Should be paired with secondary background and content, and sometimes interactive input tokens.

variables.name: Accents/Solid/Secondary
variables.description: Used for accent backgrounds, icons, text, or effects. Non-interactive only.

variables.name: Accents/Solid/Primary
variables.description: Used for accent backgrounds, icons, text, or effects. Non-interactive only.

variables.name: OnMedia/Interactive/Filled/Background/Default
variables.description: Used as the background color for interactive elements placed on top of media surfaces such as images or accent gradients. Provides strong contrast and visual presence. Should be paired with onmedia-interactive-filled-content.

variables.name: OnMedia/Interactive/Filled/Background/Hover
variables.description: Used as the background color for interactive elements placed on top of media surfaces such as images or accent gradients. Provides strong contrast and visual presence. Should be paired with onmedia-interactive-filled-content.

variables.description: Used as the background color for interactive elements placed on top of media surfaces such as images or accent gradients. Provides strong contrast and visual presence. Should be paired with onmedia-interactive-filled-content.

variables.description: Used as the background color for interactive elements placed on top of media surfaces such as images or accent gradients. Provides strong contrast and visual presence. Should be paired with onmedia-interactive-filled-content.

variables.name: OnMedia/Interactive/Hollow/Content/Hover
variables.description: Used for text or icon content in hollow-style interactive elements placed on media. Typically used for subtle overlays or lightweight UI interactions. Paired with onmedia-interactive-hollow-background and onmedia-interactive-hollow-stroke if needed.

variables.name: Interactive/Secondary/Hollow/Content/Inactive/Default
variables.description: A secondary-level interactive content used for medium-priority links or hollow secondary-level actions ranging from buttons to checkboxes to tabs. Hollow interactive content types do not require a background or border element. Examples of where inactive is used vs default secondary hollow are instances such as inactive checkbox/radio inputs or inactive tabs that utilize no background and optionally a stroke to convey that the action is inactive.
